meta.title: Le Gatsby — Café & Restaurant in Casablanca | Hassan II Mosque View
meta.description: Le Gatsby, café-restaurant in Casablanca with a direct view of the Hassan II Mosque. Refined cuisine, panoramic terrace and live concerts in the Sour Jdid district. Book your table.

hero.tagline: Café & Restaurant — Facing the Hassan II Mosque

about.title: Roaring-twenties elegance, the soul of Casablanca
about.p1: In the heart of the Sour Jdid district, facing the Hassan II Mosque, Le Gatsby blends 1920s Art Deco spirit with Casablanca's easy-going charm. Upscale yet relaxed, it is the place for a lunch facing the ocean or a romantic dinner.
about.p2: Live concerts, an intimate atmosphere, attentive service: every evening at Le Gatsby is a moment out of time, between the murmur of the Atlantic and the majestic silhouette of the world's tallest minaret.
about.video_label: Ambiance video of Le Gatsby restaurant

terrace.title: The Terrace — facing the Hassan II Mosque
terrace.text: Our panoramic terrace opens directly onto the Hassan II Mosque and the Atlantic Ocean. At sunset, the minaret glows with golden light — Casablanca's most spectacular backdrop for a dinner, a mocktail or an evening of live music.
terrace.caption: Direct view of the Hassan II Mosque from the terrace
